title: Bug Fixes
description: This mod fixes MC-244162, allowing mushrooms to spawn in caves as they did before 1.18, and MC-119599. It also fixes several other important bugs.
body:
- ### This mod fixes some bugs and minor issues. Fixes:

- > **[MC-194284](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-194284) - After reloading resource packs, the minecraft:ambient.underwater.loop sound disappears underwater.**

- > **[MC-274183](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-274183) - After reloading resource packs, the minecraft:ambient.nether_biome.loop sound disappears in nether biomes.**

- > **[MC-200131](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-200131) - After reloading resource packs, the rolling minecart sound disappears.**

- > **[MC-274182](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-274182) - After reloading resource packs, the bee buzz sound disappears.**

- > **[MC-274184](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-274184) - After reloading resource packs, the Guardian beam sound disappears.**

- > **[MC-218145](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-218145) - After reloading resource packs, the Elytra sound disappears.**

- > **[MC-119599](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-119599) - Trees in snowy biomes may be missing half of their snow.**

- > **[MC-305196](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-305196) - Witch always misses with potions at close range.**

- > **[MC-244162](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-244162) - After version 1.18, mushrooms stopped appearing in caves.**

> **Music fix: ![Music PNG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/647ee12ca727d19a65b097f7931589e98d51212e.png)Komorebi, ![Music PNG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/647ee12ca727d19a65b097f7931589e98d51212e.png)Yakusoku, ![Music PNG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/647ee12ca727d19a65b097f7931589e98d51212e.png)Pokopoko, ![Music PNG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/647ee12ca727d19a65b097f7931589e98d51212e.png)An Ordinary Day - these soundtracks are now not loud.**

- > **[MC-305570](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-305570) - All types of zombies and zombie piglins can deal damage to their pack with a spear.**

> **A small fixation of the fishing rod in the left hand.**
